name: continuous-improvement
description: 6 essential tools: status, instincts, reflection, quick CLI generation, basic PM analysis, and project overview. No config needed.

tools.name: ci_status
tools.what: See what the system has learned about your project

tools.name: ci_instincts
tools.what: List all learned behaviors with confidence levels

tools.name: ci_reflect
tools.what: Reflect on what you did this session

tools.name: ci_cli_quick
tools.what: Quickly generate basic CLI for current repository

tools.name: ci_pm_basic
tools.what: Run basic product management analysis (user personas and value proposition)

tools.name: ci_project_overview
tools.what: Get quick overview of current project state and progress

hooks.description: Silently captures every tool call as observations. <50ms, never blocks.
